parsed_review.summary: CP00-567 (RP18.P05.M06.S09-S18, risk A, 10 units, descriptor-only "Synthetic Fixture Set" slice) passes independent read-only review. Pack identity, range, deliverable distribution (implementation 3, security_audit 2, fixture 1, test 3, hermes_evidence 1), and the 10 row titles are consistent across the live closeout-pack-plan cursor, baseline, manifest, contract (current_pack + cp567_requirements + p05_fixture_slice_descriptor), registry constants, validators, and tests. All 7 public exports are defined and re-exported via index.js; descriptor functions only build frozen objects from the upstream CP00-566 descriptor with no I/O, DB, network, or filesystem writes. Validators enforce per-row descriptor_only/runtime_execution=false/customer_safe/no-raw-payload guards plus no-write-attestation and authority-boundary drift checks; the validation script deep-equals the contract projection against the generated descriptor and asserts claude_is_final_approval=false. Three substantive cp567 tests cover coverage, descriptor-only rows, and evidence/handoff boundaries. The pack honestly reports production_ready=false, runtime_ready=false, implementation_layer=descriptor — it does not weaken production gates or claim enterprise trust from local validation. Claude remains a read-only reviewer and not final approver (human approval required for runtime opening in CP00-568), and the Hermes control-plane pattern is used only for the deterministic descriptor review packet/receipt (emits_hermes_runtime_receipt=false), not product runtime. Read-only evidence requirements are satisfied: auth preflight passed with valid JSON, tools limited to Read/Grep/Glob, no forbidden tools, source_inspection_mode=read_tools_used. Unrelated dirty files (progress-control-room, workbook docs) are correctly scoped out. The not-yet-present post-review artifacts (claude-review-result.json, adjudication.md, construction-inspection.json) are expected to be produced in downstream hardening steps and are not a defect at this read_only_claude_run_raw_capture stage. No P0/P1/P2/P3 findings.
